## Changes

### [#688](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/688) Implement wallet SDK error taxonomy
- add the Node.js wallet SDK error taxonomy contract, classifying errors by validation phase (link validation, client request fetch, DID resolution, registration check, request validation, request authorization)
- add `sourceErrorCode`, `validationPhase`, `requestDid`, `requestUri`, and `requestKind` to `VCLError`
- add the `taxonomy` and `legacy` `errorCodeCompatibilityMode` to `VCLInitializationDescriptor` (default `taxonomy`)

### [#686](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/686) Add node SDK error taxonomy baseline
- add backward-compatibility baseline coverage and document the Android error taxonomy differences

### [#691](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/691) Tighten wallet SDK taxonomy compatibility mapping
- harden the legacy compatibility mapping for taxonomy errors

### [#692](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/692) Share error taxonomy test harness
- share the error taxonomy test harness across the integration suites

## Backward incompatibilities
- By default the wallet SDK now returns the new taxonomy error codes instead of the previous codes, with validation-phase and request context on `VCLError`. Set `errorCodeCompatibilityMode: 'legacy'` on `VCLInitializationDescriptor` to preserve the previous error codes.
